title: Enchanting Table Descriptions
description: Partner mod to Enchantment Descriptions or idwtialsimmoedm that adds descriptions to the enchantments shown in Enchanting Tables
body:
# Enchanting Table Descriptions

A simple partner mod to _Enchantment Descriptions_ or _idwtialsimmoedm_. Uses the same exact description format and displays these descriptions in the tooltips of the Enchanting Table.

[Amethyst Imbuement](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-imbuement) is also integrated with ETD, showing the same descriptions in the Imbuing Table.


[![Bisect Hosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/85a7141b-76c9-4f0c-bd04-21f4b0d56c4a.webp "Bisect Hosting Banner")](https://bisecthosting.com/fzzyhmstrs)

![Example Enchanting Table Description](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/72876796/216705242-e56aa4a9-3e80-47ab-a5cb-9db11e331165.png)

![Example Imbuing Table Description](https://i.imgur.com/atd8Ezm.png)
